text.title: Serverless Cold Start Optimization Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the serverless-cold-start-optimization methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: measure-baseline
step.action: Sample cold + warm latency at expected RPS.

step.name: trim-bundle-and-lazy-imports
step.action: Tree-shake, modular SDK imports, defer non-critical imports.

step.name: tune-memory
step.action: Benchmark 256/512/1024/2048MB; pick smallest that meets cold-p99 budget.

step.name: consider-runtime-swap
step.action: If budget still missed and runtime replaceable, swap to faster runtime or enable SnapStart.

step.name: size-provisioned-concurrency
step.action: If still missing, size PC by p95 concurrent invocations; configure scaling.

step.name: measure-post-fix
step.action: Re-sample cold + warm latency; record % reduction + cost delta.
step.decision-gate: SLO still missed → escalate to container migration.
